title: Validating module parameters before they are instantiated will result misleading Warnings when default parameters are nonsense.

features.name: out_of_bounds_range_select_with_default_parameter
features.description: Code should include a module parameter with a default value that exceeds the signal width, used in a range select operation where the select exceeds array bounds

features.name: parameter_override_at_instantiation
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation with parameter override that differs from the default, where the default causes out-of-bounds access but the override is valid
